title: Align Technology's Q4 Clear Aligner Revenues Fall Sequentially, Margins Compress
text: Align Technology Inc ALGN reported Q4 sales of $1.03 billion, up 1.5% sequentially and 23.6% Y/Y, surpassing the consensus of $1.02 billion. Thousands of new traders are learning the ins and outs on how to find profitable trades every day with Benzinga Trading School.
